calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-08-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2006 Continued To Mar-09-07 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 503

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Off Calendar

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Continued To Feb-28-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Oct-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew J. Wiegel for defendant and moving party: Peter Auteneuer
Robert S. Jaret for plaintiff and opposing party: Gavin Macken

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Peter Euteneur's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents is granted in part and denied in part.
1 - 7: Granted. The general objections are stricken. There is no provision in the Code of Civil Procedure for general objections. The remaining objections are overruled and stricken. If plaintiff has already provided responsive documents, said representation shall be verified.
8 - 14: Denied.
All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Set For Trial On Mar-26-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-07-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 210
